title: Goldhider's Wallpapers
description: Adds varied and unique wallpapers that are found in vanilla structures throughout the world
body:
There are currently 24 wallpapers. Try to find them all!
I'm planning to add more as a few structures still don't have any exclusive wallpapers like the ancient city and nether fortresses.

Here are all of the current wallpapers if you don't care about spoilers;

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Every Wallpaper Currently In the Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbf72f764da52ce941f0161dcd94d16b5f0f0d5d.png)

</details>
